title: Basketball shot
question: Identify the movement at the elbow as the shooting arm straightens to release the ball.
explanation: Extension increases the angle at a joint. The elbow straightens as the ball is released.

title: AFL kick
question: Identify the movement at the knee as the kicking leg straightens to contact the ball.
explanation: The knee angle increases as the lower leg swings forward.

title: Sprint start
question: Identify the movement at the ankle as the athlete pushes off the blocks.
explanation: The toes point down as the ankle extends during push-off.

title: Tennis serve
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder during the large circular serving action.
explanation: Circumduction is a circular movement combining flexion, extension, abduction and adduction.

title: Golf swing
question: Identify the movement of the trunk during the backswing.
explanation: Rotation occurs when the body turns around its long axis.

title: Star jump out
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arms move away from the midline.
explanation: Abduction is movement away from the body's midline.

title: Bicep curl
question: Identify the movement at the elbow as the weight is lifted.
explanation: Flexion decreases the angle at a joint.

title: Volleyball spike
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arm swings in a large arc to spike.
explanation: The shoulder moves through a circular path during the striking action.

title: High jump take-off
question: Identify the movement at the ankle during take-off.
explanation: The toes point down as the athlete pushes off the ground.

title: Soccer kick
question: Identify the movement at the knee as the leg swings forward to kick the ball.
explanation: The knee straightens as the leg moves forward.

title: Long jump take-off
question: Identify the movement at the ankle as the athlete leaves the board.
explanation: The ankle points down during forceful push-off.

title: Breaststroke pull
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arms move back towards the body during the pull phase.
explanation: Adduction is movement towards the body's midline.

title: Push-up setup
question: Identify the forearm movement when the palms face down on the ground.
explanation: Pronation turns the forearm so the palm faces down or backward.

title: Receiving a tray
question: Identify the forearm movement when the palms face up to support the tray.
explanation: Supination turns the forearm so the palm faces up or forward.

title: Cricket batting shot
question: Identify the trunk movement used to generate power through the batting shot.
explanation: The trunk rotates around its long axis.

title: Shot put
question: Identify the movement as the arm straightens to push the shot away from the body.
explanation: Extension increases the angle as the arm straightens.

title: Swimming recovery
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arm circles over the water.
explanation: Circumduction is a circular movement at the shoulder.

title: Overhead medicine ball throw
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arms move forwards and upwards to throw.
explanation: Shoulder flexion moves the arm forwards and upwards.

title: Netball chest pass
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arms move across the body towards the target.
explanation: Horizontal adduction moves the arm across the body in the transverse plane.

title: Rowing drive
question: Identify the movement at the knee as the rower drives through the legs.
explanation: The knees straighten during the drive phase.

title: Dancer leg lift
question: Identify the movement at the hip as the leg moves backwards behind the body.
explanation: Hip extension moves the thigh backwards.

title: Cycling pedal down
question: Identify the movement at the knee as the pedal is pushed down.
explanation: The knee straightens during the downstroke.

title: Taekwondo front kick
question: Identify the movement at the knee as the lower leg snaps forwards.
explanation: The knee extends as the kicking leg straightens.

title: Rugby lineout lift
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arms move upwards to catch the ball.
explanation: Shoulder flexion moves the arms forwards and upwards.

title: Kayak paddle stroke
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arm pulls back during the power phase.
explanation: Shoulder extension moves the arm backwards.

title: Gymnast handstand
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arms support the body overhead.
explanation: The shoulder is flexed when the arms are raised overhead.

title: Skateboard push-off
question: Identify the movement at the ankle as the foot pushes against the ground.
explanation: The toes point down during push-off.

title: Ice hockey slap shot
question: Identify the trunk movement used to generate power for the shot.
explanation: The trunk rotates to transfer force into the stick.

title: Boxing jab
question: Identify the movement at the shoulder as the arm moves across the body to punch.
explanation: Horizontal adduction brings the arm across the front of the body.

title: Squat down
question: Identify the movement at the knee and hip as the body lowers into the squat.
explanation: Flexion decreases the angle at the knee and hip.

title: Discus throw
question: Identify the main movement used to generate power in the discus throw.
explanation: Rotation turns the trunk and shoulder around an axis.

title: Baseball pitch
question: Identify the shoulder movement as the throwing arm moves across the body during release.
explanation: Horizontal adduction moves the arm across the body.

title: Hammer throw
question: Identify the movement of the trunk before release.
explanation: The trunk rotates to build momentum.

title: Tennis forehand
question: Identify the shoulder movement as the arm moves across the body to hit the ball.
explanation: Horizontal adduction brings the arm across the body.

title: Cricket bowling
question: Identify the shoulder movement during the circular bowling action.
explanation: The arm travels in a circular path.

title: Pull-up
question: Identify the movement at the elbow as the body is pulled upward.
explanation: The elbow bends, decreasing the joint angle.

title: Bench press
question: Identify the movement at the elbow as the bar is pushed upward.
explanation: The elbow straightens, increasing the joint angle.

title: Dive into water
question: Identify the movement at the ankle as the toes point during entry.
explanation: The ankle points down during plantar flexion.

title: Landing from jump
question: Identify the movement at the ankle as the athlete absorbs impact on landing.
explanation: Dorsiflexion moves the toes upward towards the shin.

title: Wall push-up
question: Identify the shoulder movement as the arms push against the wall.
explanation: Horizontal adduction moves the arms towards the midline across the body.
